field_reviews.paper_evidence: In this paper, we extend the GUI-VP with RVV Version 1.0 resulting in RISC-V VP++ which is available on GitHub1.
field_reviews.reason: 研究目标与摘要及引言一致，准确概括了将 RVV v1.0 集成到开源 SystemC TLM VP 并用于系统级评估。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We show that by integrating a simple, parametrizable instruction-accurate execution cycle model, and comparing the execution of non-vectorized with vectorized implementations, valuable assessments can be derived for the design of RVV micro-architectures.
field_reviews.reason: 对系统级评估与早期架构探索价值的总结基本贴合原文，没有明显夸大。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Leveraging code generation for over 20k of the total 23k+ Lines of Code (LoC) required to integrate the 600+ RVV instructions, the potential for implementation errors and maintenance overhead is greatly reduced.
field_reviews.reason: 四条贡献点总体都能由原文支撑，且 evidence 基本可定位到论文原句。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: The ratified Version 1.0 of RVV is specified in [13]. Essential parts added to the RISC-V programming model by RVV are: (i) 32 Vector registers, (ii) 7 Control and Status Registers (CSRs), and (iii) 624 instructions.
field_reviews.reason: 论文核心聚焦 RVV 向量扩展虚拟原型与向量微架构评估，主主题分类正确。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: For the RV32 and RV64 ISS, over 10, 400 lines of code are generated each. This totals to over 20, 800 lines of generated code.
field_reviews.reason: 论文确实包含代码生成，但重点不是编译器或算子生成；作为次主题可接受，但证据较弱。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 可保留为次主题，但不要将论文表述为编译器工作

field_reviews.paper_evidence: To the best of our knowledge, the VP presented in this paper is the only open-source, SystemC based VP that supports RVV and an instruction-accurate execution cycle model.
field_reviews.reason: 论文属于 RVV 向量扩展与 RISC-V ISA 评估工具，映射到 workstream 2 合理。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: To the best of our knowledge, the VP presented in this paper is the only open-source, SystemC based VP that supports RVV and an instruction-accurate execution cycle model.
field_reviews.reason: 论文是 RVV 系统级评估平台，不是 CPU 内核矩阵扩展或 in-core accelerator，设为 false 正确。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: Handcar is based on the widespread Spike [14] simulator and has been extended to generate trace output. For each instruction executed, all memory and register accesses (reads and writes) are logged as a separate line of the trace.
field_reviews.reason: 前半段关于 code generation、vLoop、elem_sel_t 和 param_sel_t 有依据，但“以 Handcar 参考模拟器进行 trace 比对，并以 riscvOVPsim 计算功能覆盖率”比原文更具体，且原文并未把 Handcar 与 riscvOVPsim并列描述为一个统一 methodology 结论句。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留代码生成与参数化执行模型描述；验证链改写为更保守的“使用 FORCE-RISCV 生成测试，借助 Handcar 进行 trace 比对，并用 riscvOVPsim 统计覆盖率”

field_reviews.paper_evidence: For PNG Average we see that the maximum acceleration of 3.996 is reached with 32 Lanes. For MAC_32_16_16, we see a maximum acceleration of 3.566 with VLEN 512 and 2048 Lanes.
field_reviews.reason: 核心结果方向正确，但将 3.996 和 3.566 改写为带乘号的“3.996×/3.566×”，以及“最高加速比”表达需要严格贴合原文；另外 2048 是 Lanes 数，不应误读为“VLEN=512, 2048 Lanes”的并列单位混乱。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 将结果改写为论文原文数值写法，并保留 64 bits 内存访问限制与 81.44% 覆盖率

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We present non-vectorized and vectorized variants of two common algorithms which are executed on the VP with varying parameters.
field_reviews.reason: 前两条 gap 基本成立，但第 1 条 evidence 不是逐字引文，第 3 条 evidence 使用了省略号拼接两个句子，不符合 direct quote 要求。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 将所有 evidence 改为逐字原文；第 3 条改用摘要中“two common algorithms”作为直接证据

field_reviews.paper_evidence: To the best of our knowledge, the VP presented in this paper is the only open-source, SystemC based VP that supports RVV and an instruction-accurate execution cycle model.
field_reviews.reason: “首个支持 RVV v1.0 的开源 SystemC TLM 虚拟原型”有原文依据，但“被引 12 次、说明其影响力”不来自论文正文。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 删除被引次数与影响力判断，仅保留论文直接支持的 state-of-the-art 描述

field_reviews.paper_evidence: For RVV micro-architectures, we can state (i) that larger registers (VLEN) or more computational units (Lanes) do not automatically lead to a linear increase in performance, and (ii) that special attention should be paid to the memory interface.
field_reviews.reason: 关于缺少 AI 工作负载和内存接口瓶颈的提炼基本能从论文推导出来，且与 proposal 写作相关。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保持不变，但措辞维持“可支撑 gap 讨论”而非“直接证明”

field_reviews.paper_evidence: For PNG Average we see that the maximum acceleration of 3.996 is reached with 32 Lanes. For MAC_32_16_16, we see a maximum acceleration of 3.566 with VLEN 512 and 2048 Lanes.
field_reviews.reason: “3.5–4.0×”“2.5k LoC 手写 vs 20k+ 自动生成”属于二次概括，其中 4.0× 和 2.5 的数字形式并非论文原文；“对 AI 推理加速具有实际潜力”也超出了本文实验覆盖范围。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 改为保守表述：论文在两个非 AI 算法上观察到 3.996 和 3.566 的最大加速，并展示了大规模 RVV 集成与验证流程的工程可行性

issues.paper_evidence: We present non-vectorized and vectorized variants of two common algorithms which are executed on the VP with varying parameters.
issues.problem: evidence 通过省略号拼接两段不同位置文本，不是论文中的逐字直接引文。
issues.recommended_action: 改为使用摘要中的直接引文，支撑“案例研究仅覆盖两个算法”这一更保守结论

issues.paper_evidence: 信息不足，无法从文本中提取
issues.problem: 加入“被引 12 次，说明其影响力”这一论文文本之外的信息，超出 source-paper grounding。
issues.recommended_action: 删除被引次数和影响力判断

issues.paper_evidence: For PNG Average we see that the maximum acceleration of 3.996 is reached with 32 Lanes.
issues.problem: 将实验结论外推到 AI 推理加速，并使用了论文中不存在的“4.0×”写法。
issues.recommended_action: 仅保留论文直接报告的两个算法加速结果，不要扩展为 AI 推理结论

issues.paper_evidence: Although this value is already promising, there is still potential for improvement. However, they are left for future work and could for example include: (i) increasing the number of generated test cases, (ii) defining more sophisticated FORCE-RISCV test templates for RVV, (iii) integrating fuzzing techniques in FORCE-RISCV, or (iv) investigating the application of metamorphic testing methods [20].
issues.problem: evidence 少量改写了原文，不是逐字引用。

issues.paper_evidence: For MAC_32_16_16, we see a maximum acceleration of 3.566 with VLEN 512 and 2048 Lanes.
issues.recommended_action: 恢复为论文原文数值写法

issues.paper_evidence: Manfred Schlägl Moritz Stockinger Daniel Große
issues.problem: corpus metadata 只保留了第一作者，但论文首页正文清楚列出三位作者，当前 dossier 作者列表与论文首页一致。
issues.recommended_action: 在 revised_analysis 中保留三位作者，并在 review 中注明 corpus metadata 截断问题

review_target.analysis_title: A RISC-V "V" VP: Unlocking Vector Processing for Evaluation at the System Level
review_target.paper_title: A RISC-V "V" VP: Unlocking Vector Processing for Evaluation at the System Level

summary: 该 dossier 的整体方向基本正确，论文主题、主要贡献和大部分关键结论都能在原文中找到依据。主要问题在于个别 evidence 不是逐字原文、部分数值写法与论文不一致，以及 proposal_evidence 中加入了超出论文文本的外推。修正这些问题后可作为下游材料使用，但当前版本不宜直接用于开题论证。
